strengths: Direct AI agent development experience at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, precisely matching the listed requirement
20+ years of fullstack delivery across TypeScript, Node.js, React, Java, Docker, Kubernetes, and MongoDB — exceeds the 6-year bar by a wide margin
Deeply ingrained TDD culture evidenced by open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), multiple public workshops, and consistent test-first practice across employers
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin (listed as a secondary requirement) does not appear on the resume; only Java is cited
No mention of Vitest or Playwright; alignment with the team's specific testing toolchain is unverified
response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned fullstack engineer whose current role directly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a rare and high-value alignment with this position's emerging requirement. His command of TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud/containerization tooling maps cleanly to the primary stack, and his consistent TDD practice and open-source testing contributions signal the engineering discipline the role demands. The main gap is the absence of Nest.js experience, which is the team's primary backend framework; however, given his depth with Node.js and demonstrated adaptability across many frameworks and languages over two decades, this is a learnable delta rather than a disqualifying hole.
